label: 2023 La Vuelta Ciclista a Espana Stage 7

extraction.one_line_summary: SOUPE Geoffrey won the sprint from support duties when leadout target Van Gestel wasn't positioned, beating AULAR by centimeters at 350m.
tactical_patterns: Intermediate sprint at 35km out drew Vingegaard bonus-hunting, revealing GC ambitions despite flat stage—climbers fighting for seconds early.
Final corner at 350m to go created positioning chaos; Gonzales dive-bomb for Kikko Real scattered multiple leadout trains mid-sprint.
Coastal wind factor after intermediate sprint failed to split peloton; predicted echelon threat never materialized despite high speeds.

rider_signals.SOUPE Geoffrey: positive: Support rider capitalized when Van Gestel missed positioning, suggesting opportunistic sprint speed beyond pure domestique capability.
rider_signals.AULAR Orluis: positive: Venezuelan champion showed independent sprint positioning through middle chaos, nearly winning without organized leadout.
rider_signals.GROVES Kaden: negative: Dominant back-to-back winner disappointed despite extending points lead, suggesting fatigue or tactical error in technical finale.
rider_signals.VINGEGAARD Jonas: neutral: Contested intermediate sprint for bonus seconds on flat stage, indicating GC time-gaps tight enough to justify energy expenditure.
rider_signals.ARENSMAN Thymen: negative: Crashed heavily 5km out into already-fallen rider, abandoned race—Ineos losing key mountain support before critical weekend.
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: negative: Early cornfield excursion requiring medical attention to knee, poor demeanor suggests injury affecting remaining Vuelta ambitions.
